overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe down a river at golden hour. The journey transitions from a narrow canyon passage to a wide open lake, featuring realistic water physics and warm sunset lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon river with steep dirt walls

agents.ego_description: paddling a canoe steadily through the narrow canyon river, navigating the calm reflective waters

entered.detail: steep dirt and rock canyon wall rising vertically from the water's edge
grassy and dirt slope with sparse vegetation descending to the water
bright golden reflection of the setting sun on the water surface
hazy mountain range silhouetted against the warm sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a canoe through a narrow river canyon. Steep dirt walls rise on both sides while the setting sun casts a golden glare across the water ahead. The character paddles steadily through the calm, reflective water toward distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening river with rocky obstacles and sandy banks

events.description: exits narrow canyon as the steep left cliff recedes and the river channel widens significantly
navigates around rocky outcrops protruding from the water as the shoreline transitions to sandy beach

agents.ego_description: continuing to paddle through the widening river, maneuvering around visible rocks in the water while the banks become lower and sandier

entered.detail: rocks protruding from the water surface creating obstacles in the river channel
sandy shoreline replacing the steep dirt slopes with gentle beaches
trees and bushes lining the sandy bank along the right shore

segments.scene_description: The river opens up as the canoe leaves the canyon behind. Rocky outcrops appear in the water ahead while the right shoreline transforms into a sandy beach with scattered trees. The left canyon wall recedes into the distance as the waterway broadens and the character paddles past the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide open lake with distant forested shores

events.description: river opens into a wide lake with expansive water views and distant forested shorelines visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: paddling across the expansive open water toward the distant shoreline with mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: wide expanse of calm water stretching to the horizon with no visible end
tree-covered hills and forest along the distant right shoreline

segments.scene_description: The waterway transforms into a wide open lake with expansive views in all directions. The rocky obstacles and sandy banks of the river are left behind as the canoe glides across the open water toward a distant forested shoreline. The mountains now appear on the left horizon while the sun continues to cast a warm golden light across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a canoe travels from a confined river canyon into the vast expanse of an open lake under a golden sunset. It begins by following the vessel through a narrow passage where steep dirt walls rise on either side and the setting sun casts a brilliant glare across the reflective water. As the canoe moves forward, the canyon walls recede and the waterway broadens, shifting the landscape toward rocky outcrops and a sandy shoreline dotted with trees. The scene then expands fully into a wide lake, leaving the river's obstacles behind as the canoe glides across the open water. Finally, the view opens to a distant forested shoreline with mountains framing the left horizon, all bathed in a consistent, warm golden light.
